name: babypath
description: Evidence-based tools for new parents — speech therapy, milestones, coloring, guides

scripts.build: cp -r games guides www/ 2>/dev/null; echo 'Build complete'
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:ios: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.cap:android: npm run cap:sync && npx cap open android
